refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [map1, map2] = imconvertmaps(mapx, mapy); [map1, map2] = imconvertmaps(mapx, mapy, scale)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Converts floating-point remap coordinates into a repeatable fixed-point pair. The default scale is 32 and the result can be stored or reused before calling a remap workflow.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Source reference: official OpenCV documentation. Example 1 is an adapted OpenCV workflow; Example 2 is an independent IPCV workflow.
